repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster repair-88180-fresh-plan-20260618b.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88180
Canonical PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88180
Credited author: @yozu / Yoshikazu Terashi

Scope:
- Keep the IDENTITY.md-specific system-prompt guidance in src/agents/system-prompt.ts.
- Keep focused regression coverage in src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts.
- Revert .github/pull_request_template.md unless the executor proves it is directly required for this repair.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Notes:
- Merge is disabled for this job.
- Do not comment, label, close, force-push, or bypass checks.
- #65777 is security-routed context only and should not be mutated by this repair.
